title: Bear in Backyard
initial_variations: Oh my god, there's a {animal_size} {animal_type} in my backyard! It's tearing apart my fence! Please send help!
Hi, I'm {caller_name} at {address_location}. I think I hear something big outside... it sounds like an {animal_type}. What should I do?
You're not gonna believe this, but a {animal_size} {animal_type} just walked into my yard. My kids are scared. Get someone here now!
Hey, uh, this is {caller_name} from {address_location}. There's a {animal_type} out here. It's pretty calm, but I don't feel safe. Can you send animal control?

initial: My address is {address_location}.
I'm at {address_location}.
It's {address_location}.
I'm at {address_location}!
hiding: I'm hiding inside at {address_location}.
Still at {address_location}, in the closet.
We're at {address_location}, locked in the bathroom.
confronting: I'm at {address_location}, trying to scare it away.
It's {address_location}, I'm waving my arms.
secured: Animal control got it. I'm at {address_location}.

initial: It's a {animal_size} {animal_type} and it's destroying my yard.
I see a {animal_type}. It's {animal_size}.
It's {animal_size}, brown fur, definitely a {animal_type}.
hiding: From the window, it looks {animal_size} and brown.
I can hear it sniffing around. It's a {animal_type}.
confronting: It's right in front of me! {animal_size} {animal_type}, and it's not backing down.
secured: It was a {animal_size} {animal_type}. Now it's gone.

initial: I'm going to try to scare it away.
I'm staying inside.
hiding: I'm hiding in the basement with my family.
I'm staying put.
confronting: I'm yelling at it to go away.
I'm banging pots.

initial: It's {animal_size} and looks like a {animal_type}.
Brown fur, big paws. {animal_size}.
hiding: I think it's a {animal_type}. Big one.
confronting: It's a {animal_size} {animal_type}, angry.

initial: There are 2 adults and 3 kids.
Just me and my dog.
My whole family of 4.
hiding: We're all hiding. 4 people.
Just me and my cat.
confronting: It's just me here.
Me and my neighbor.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived but animal control was needed. A waste of resources.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters are not trained for bears. They called animal control.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: No injuries reported. Medical dispatch was completely unnecessary. Resources wasted.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrived and safely tranquilized and relocated the bear.

DISMISS.message: You dismissed a legitimate bear encounter. The bear injured a person before animal control was called again.

Uh, yes, I'd like to report a {animal_color} alligator at {address_location}. It's just chilling, but it's near houses. Should I be worried?

Right by the pond at {address_location}.
I'm at {address_location}.
trapped: I'm trapped in my car at {address_location}.
The alligator is blocking my driveway at {address_location}.
evacuated: We evacuated to {address_location} nearby.

initial: It's a {animal_color} alligator, looks about 6 feet long.
Large {animal_color} reptile, maybe 8 feet.
trapped: It's right outside my car door. {animal_color} and big.
evacuated: From a distance, it's {animal_color} and moving slowly.
resolved: It was {animal_color}. Animal control got it.

initial: I'm staying back, but it's getting closer.
I'm trying to warn people.
trapped: I can't move. It's right in front of my car.
I'm stuck inside my house with it at the door.
evacuated: We've all moved to the other side of the street.
Everyone is in the community center.

Looks like a {animal_color} alligator, pretty large.
trapped: Close up, it's {animal_color} and has yellow eyes.
evacuated: It's {animal_color}, I'd say 6-8 feet.

trapped: My family is inside the house with me.
evacuated: Everyone has been evacuated. Around 20 people.
We're all at a safe distance.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police managed crowd control but couldn't handle the alligator. Animal control was needed.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters are not equipped for alligators. They called animal control.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: No injuries, but paramedics stood by. Overkill.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrived and captured the alligator safely. Area cleared.

DISMISS.message: You dismissed the call. The alligator attacked a dog and caused a car accident.

title: Bear in the Suburbs
summary: A homeowner reports a bear rummaging through their trash and then entering their garage. The bear appears agitated and is trapped inside the garage.
initial_variations: There's a huge bear in my garage! It's tearing everything apart! Please send help! This is {caller_name} at {address_location}.
Oh my God, we have a bear trapped in our garage. It's going crazy! Hurry! My family is hiding inside the house. We are at {address_location}.
A bear just broke into my garage! It's snarling and trying to get out. I think it's scared. We need animal control now! This is {caller_name} at {address_location}.
We're trapped in our house because a bear is in the garage. It's banging against the door. I can hear it growling. Please help! Address: {address_location}.

specific_details: bear is about 6 feet tall, brown fur

initial: We're at {address_location}. Please hurry!
It's {address_location}, the house with the broken garage door.

{address_location} - we moved to the upstairs bedroom.
It's {address_location}. Please tell us what to do!

We're at {address_location} and the bear broke through! Help!
{address_location} - the bear is in the house!
secured: We're safe now at {address_location}. Animal control is here.
The bear is secured at {address_location}. Thanks.
We're at {address_location} and the bear is tranquilized.

initial: It's a large brown bear, maybe 300 pounds. It's in the garage.
The bear is black, about 5 feet tall. It just wants food.
I see a mother bear with two cubs. They're scared.
The bear is aggressive, showing teeth and growling.
trapped_inside: The bear is now in the garage, but it's quiet. Maybe it's calming down.
The bear is pacing back and forth. It looks stressed.
The bear is trying to climb the walls. It's getting desperate.
The bear broke a window and half escaped. Now it's stuck.
bear_charging: The bear just rammed the front door! It's breaking through!
It's charging at us! We need police with guns!
The bear is inside! It's in the living room!
It swatted at my husband! We're running upstairs!
secured: Animal control has it caged. No injuries.
They shot a tranquilizer. Bear is down.
Police scared it off into the woods.
The bear is safely trapped in the garage waiting.

initial: Yes, I'm sure it's a bear. It's not a dog!
Absolutely. I can see its claws and ears.
Yes, I've seen bears before. This is real.
Definitely a bear. It just roared.
trapped_inside: Yes, still a bear. It's now inside the garage.
Yes, it's still there. Please hurry.
Yes, we are not joking. It's a real bear.
Yes, we can hear it breathing.

initial: We're hiding in the house. The door is locked.
The garage door is closed, but the bear is inside.
We're in the kitchen, far from the garage.
Kids are in the bedroom. We're scared.

We locked ourselves in the bathroom. The bear is at the door.
We're in the attic. The bear is downstairs.
We have a weapon in case.

We're running out the back door!
I'm hiding in a closet! I hear it outside!
secured: Everyone is fine. Thanks for the help.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived but were not equipped to handle a bear. Animal control was called as backup. Delay caused by incorrect dispatch.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department arrived with sirens, which agitated the bear further. It broke into the house and injured a resident before being subdued.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: No medical emergency initially. Medical units arrived but were unable to handle the bear. Bear attacked the paramedics, causing injuries.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrived promptly, assessed the situation, and safely tranquilized the bear. No injuries and bear relocated to a forest.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as non-emergency. Bear escaped garage and roamed neighborhood, causing property damage and injuring a jogger before being shot by police.

title: Alligator in the Pool

I'm positive. It has a long tail and teeth.

Absolutely. Everyone is terrified.
evacuating: Yes, still an alligator. It's still in the pool.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived and secured the area, but were not animal experts. They had to wait for animal control, causing some delay and panic.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters used water hoses to spray the alligator, which agitated it. It attacked a firefighter's boot but no injuries. Gator was eventually captured by animal control.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical units arrived but were unprepared for the alligator. The alligator bit a paramedic's leg, requiring hospitalization. Incident escalated.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrived quickly with proper equipment. Tranquilized the alligator and removed it safely. No injuries. Resort guests praised response.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as likely hoax. Alligator attacked a child playing by the pool, causing severe injuries. Resort sued for negligence.

title: Cows on the Highway

the truck driver is trapped in his cab

my friend in the car next to me

All motorists accounted for. Cows secure.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived, set up roadblocks, and directed traffic while animal control handled the cows. Efficient coordination prevented further accidents.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire trucks arrived with sirens, startling the cows and causing them to stampede onto the other side of the highway, causing more crashes.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical units treated minor injuries but could not manage the cows. Police and animal control had to be called anyway.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrived with trailers and herded the cows off the highway efficiently. Traffic resumed within an hour. No major injuries.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a prank. Cows continued to roam the highway, causing a multi-car pileup with fatalities. The truck driver died from injuries.

title: Snake in Daycare

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived and secured the area but were not trained in snake handling. Animal control had to be called, causing a 20-minute delay.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters attempted to remove snake but it slithered into a vent, requiring building maintenance and pest control to remove it later.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: No bites reported. Medical units unnecessarily tied up resources. When a real medical emergency came, response was delayed.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal expert arrived, identified the snake as a non-venomous garter snake, and safely removed it. Children watched with fascination. Great outcome.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as prank. Snake turned out to be a venomous rattlesnake. It bit a child before being killed by a teacher. Child survived but permanent damage.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived and helped corral visitors, but the monkey was too quick. Animal control had to catch it later. Some minor injuries from falls.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters used a ladder to try to reach the monkey in a tree, but it kept moving. They accidentally knocked over a food cart, causing mess.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical units arrived but were not needed. They blocked the ambulance bay, delaying an actual emergency call. Monkey still loose.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control zoo staff quickly responded with treats and a net. The monkey was lured back into its enclosure within minutes. Visitors amused.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as not serious. Monkey entered the control room and caused a power outage. Zoo had to evacuate. Several visitors injured in the dark.

title: Kangaroo on the Highway
description: A caller reports a large kangaroo hopping along a busy highway, causing cars to swerve and nearly causing multiple collisions. The caller is in a car, following at a safe distance.

states.initial: Caller is in a vehicle, observing the kangaroo.
states.following: Caller is following the kangaroo at a distance to keep track of its location.
states.stopped: Caller has pulled over and is watching from the roadside.
states.evacuated: Caller has left the area and is reporting from a safe spot.

initial_variations: There's a massive kangaroo on the highway! It's causing chaos, cars are swerving everywhere at {address_location}!
Oh my god, a giant kangaroo is hopping down the middle of {address_location} and almost hit a car! You need to send help!
I'm on {address_location} and there's a kangaroo in the road! People are slamming on brakes, it's a disaster!
This is insane! A kangaroo just bounced across the highway near {address_location} and caused a pile-up! Hurry!

specific_details: the kangaroo is about 6 feet tall
it has a joey in its pouch
there's a damaged car with a flat tire from swerving

initial: I'm on {address_location}, heading northbound. The kangaroo is hopping south in the median.
We're at {address_location}, near the overpass. Please send someone!
following: I'm still following it on {address_location}, now near the gas station. It's moving fast!
It's on {address_location} just past the big billboard. I'm a quarter mile behind.
stopped: I pulled over at the rest area on {address_location}. The kangaroo is about 200 yards ahead, still on the highway.
I'm at the side of {address_location} near the truck stop. It's now in the southbound lanes.
evacuated: I've moved to the parking lot of the mall off {address_location}. It's still on the highway, but I can see it from here.

initial: It's a huge kangaroo, maybe 6 feet tall, with a joey. It's hopping erratically, almost causing crashes.
It's gray and muscular, definitely a wild kangaroo. It jumped in front of a minivan!
following: It just hopped over a guardrail and back onto the road. It's getting aggressive, kicking at cars.
Two cars have minor collisions trying to avoid it. It's now on the shoulder, looking confused.
stopped: From here I can see it's stopped in the middle of the road, looking around. Traffic is backing up badly.

evacuated: It's still on the highway, but traffic has slowed to a crawl. No injuries that I can see.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department arrives with a large truck, but the kangaroo escapes into the woods. Traffic chaos continues.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical team arrives to treat minor injuries from the fender benders, but the kangaroo remains loose.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives with a tranquilizer gun and safely captures the kangaroo. It is later released in a wildlife reserve.

DISMISS.message: Call was dismissed, but the kangaroo caused a multi-car accident with serious injuries. Callers later sue the dispatch center.

hiding: Still at {address_location}, hiding in a cafe.
Same place, {address_location}, it's near the bank.
evacuated: I left downtown from {address_location}.
It was at {address_location} when I got out.

initial: It's a {specific_details}, very tall!
Yes, a {specific_details}, with big antlers.
hiding: Still a {specific_details}, it's walking calmly.
Same {specific_details}, it's looking around.
evacuated: It was a {specific_details} when I left.
A {specific_details}, that's what I saw.
secured: The {specific_details} is sedated and being moved.

initial: No injuries yet, but it could charge.
People are keeping distance.
hiding: I'm safe inside. Not sure about outside.
No blood seen.
evacuated: I'm fine. Others seemed okay too.
No injuries reported as I left.
secured: No injuries. Moose is under control.

initial: Yes, it's still wandering around!
Still there, causing traffic jam!

It's still in the square.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived and cleared the area. They guided the moose out of the city with the help of animal control.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department helped direct traffic but could not handle the moose. Animal control was needed.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical unit stood by but no injuries. They assisted with crowd control.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control tranquilized the moose and transported it to a wildlife refuge.

DISMISS.message: You dismissed the call. The moose charged at a pedestrian and caused a car crash, resulting in injuries.

title: Crocodile in Flooded Street

states.initial: Caller reports a crocodile in floodwater
states.hiding: Caller is on higher ground or in a building

A crocodile is in the water on my street! At {address_location}! This is {caller_name}. Please send animal control! Background: {ambient_audio}.
Help! A {specific_details} is lurking in the floodwater at {address_location}. It's dangerous! Caller {caller_name}. Sound: {ambient_audio}.
I'm at {address_location} and a {specific_details} just appeared in the flood. My name is {caller_name}. I hear {ambient_audio}.

address_location: the corner of River Road and Oak
the flooded intersection near the bayou
the street in front of the high school
the parking lot of the flood zone
ambient_audio: a mix of sirens and rushing water

initial: I'm at {address_location}, the flooded area!
It's at {address_location}, please hurry!
Please, {address_location}!
hiding: Still at {address_location}, on my roof.
Same place, {address_location}, it's circling.
evacuated: I left {address_location} to higher ground.
It was at {address_location} when I left.

Yes, a {specific_details}, about 12 feet.
hiding: Still a {specific_details}, it's near my car.
Same {specific_details}, it's swimming towards me.
evacuated: It was a {specific_details} when I saw it.
A {specific_details}, that's what I saw.
secured: The {specific_details} is in a cage now.

initial: No one has been attacked yet!
People are staying away.
hiding: I'm safe but it's close. Others might be in danger.
No injuries near me.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police evacuated the area and kept people away until animal control arrived.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department tried to snare the crocodile but it escaped into a drain. Animal control later caught it.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical team was on standby but no injuries occurred.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control captured the crocodile with a pole and transported it to a sanctuary.

DISMISS.message: You dismissed the call. The crocodile attacked a resident trying to wade through the flood, causing severe injury.

title: Bear in School Playground
description: A caller reports a bear wandering near a playground full of children during recess. The bear appears agitated but not aggressive yet.

states.initial: The caller has just noticed the bear and is describing the scene.
states.hiding: The caller and children have moved indoors or taken cover.
states.evacuated: The area has been cleared of people.
states.secure: The bear has been contained or has left the area.

initial_variations: There's a bear! It's right by the playground! We need help now! The kids are still outside!
Oh my God, I think I see a bear near the school. It's huge. Please send someone, the children are playing.
Um, hi. There's a bear at {school_name}. It's walking towards the playground. I'm scared. Please hurry.

initial: We're at {school_name}, {address_location}. The bear is near the playground!
It's {address_location}, at the elementary school. Please come!
hiding: We're inside the school building now. The address is {address_location}.
evacuated: Everyone is out. The location is {address_location}.
secure: The bear is gone. We're still at {address_location}.

initial: There are {number_of_children} children. The bear is {bear_behavior}.
I see the bear {bear_behavior}. Kids are scared.
hiding: No one is hurt. We're all hiding inside.
We're safe inside, but the bear is still out there.
evacuated: Everyone is out of the area. No injuries.
secure: The bear is gone. No one was hurt.

initial: It's urgent! The bear is getting closer!
Please hurry, it's just a few feet away!
hiding: We're safe for now, but we need help to remove the bear.
It's not urgent now, but we're trapped inside.
evacuated: The situation is under control. We need animal control.
No need to rush, but we need the bear gone.
secure: The situation is resolved. Thank you.

initial: Okay, everyone move inside slowly. Don't run.
Get the children to the classroom, lock the doors.
hiding: Now, make sure all doors are locked and stay quiet.
Good, stay put. We're sending animal control.
evacuated: Please stay away from the area. We'll handle the bear.
Thank you for following instructions.
secure: The bear has been tranquilized. All clear.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrive but are not equipped for animal control. They secure the perimeter until animal control arrives. Minor delay.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrive with no animal control training. They manage to scare the bear away, but it could have gone worse.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical team arrives, but no injuries. They stand by unnecessarily.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrives quickly and safely tranquilizes the bear. No injuries, children safe.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as a prank. The bear attacks a child before police arrive. Severe injuries.

title: Raccoons in Restaurant Kitchen
description: A restaurant manager calls because several raccoons have broken into the kitchen through a damaged vent, causing chaos and health risks.

states.initial: The caller reports raccoons in the kitchen, describing the scene.
states.evacuated: Staff and customers have been evacuated from the restaurant.
states.containment: The raccoons are trapped or isolated in the kitchen.
states.cleanup: The raccoons have been removed, and cleanup begins.

initial_variations: This is an emergency! Raccoons are running around the kitchen, ruining everything!
I need help! {raccoon_count} raccoons got into the kitchen. They're making a huge mess!
Hi, there are raccoons in my restaurant kitchen. The health inspector will shut us down. Please send someone.

initial: We're at {restaurant_name}, {address_location}. The raccoons are in the back.
It's {address_location}, at the restaurant. Please come.
evacuated: Everyone is outside at {address_location}.
The restaurant is empty. Address is {address_location}.
containment: We've locked them in the kitchen. Still at {address_location}.
cleanup: We're cleaning up at {address_location}. All clear.

initial: There are {raccoon_count} raccoons. They have {damage_description}.
The raccoons are {damage_description}. It's a mess.
evacuated: No one is inside. The raccoons are still in the kitchen.
We're safe outside. The raccoons are contained inside.
containment: The raccoons are trapped. No one is hurt.
They're in the kitchen with doors closed.
cleanup: The raccoons are gone. We need to sanitize.

initial: It's urgent! They're destroying the kitchen!
Please hurry before they get into the dining area!
evacuated: The situation is under control, but we need them removed.
Not urgent now, but we need animal control.
containment: No urgency, they're trapped. But we need someone to take them.

initial: Evacuate the restaurant immediately. Close the kitchen doors.
Get everyone out and seal the kitchen.
evacuated: Good. Now make sure no one goes back in. We're sending animal control.
Keep everyone away from the kitchen.
containment: Wait for animal control. Do not approach the raccoons.
Stay away until they are removed.
cleanup: You can start cleaning once animal control confirms it's safe.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police respond but cannot handle raccoons. They set up perimeter, but problem persists.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters use hoses to chase raccoons out, causing water damage to the kitchen.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical team arrives but no injuries. They waste resources.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control safely captures and removes the raccoons. Kitchen can be cleaned.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as minor. Raccoons cause extensive damage and health code violation results in shutdown.

title: Swarm of Bees Blocking Traffic
description: A massive swarm of bees has settled on a vehicle at a busy intersection, causing gridlock and panicked drivers.

states.initial: The caller reports bees covering a car and blocking traffic.
states.trapped: The caller is trapped in their car with bees outside.
states.evacuated: People have abandoned vehicles and are taking shelter.
states.cleared: The swarm has been dispersed or removed.

address_location: the main intersection in the city center
bee_swarm_size: so many you can't see the car
traffic_conditions: complete gridlock, emergency vehicles can't pass

initial_variations: Oh my God, there's a swarm of bees covering a car at {intersection_name}! Traffic is a mess!
Help! Bees everywhere! They're swarming a car and people are panicking at {address_location}.
I'm stuck in traffic because of a giant bee swarm at {intersection_name}. It's chaos!

initial: At {intersection_name}, {address_location}. The swarm is on a red car.
It's at the corner of {intersection_name}.
trapped: I'm in my car at {intersection_name}. Bees are covering my windows!
Location is still {address_location}. I'm trapped inside.
evacuated: We've all moved away from the intersection. North side of the street.
Everyone is inside the coffee shop on the corner.
cleared: The intersection is clear now at {address_location}.

initial: There are {bee_swarm_size} bees. Traffic is {traffic_conditions}.
The swarm is huge. People are abandoning their cars.
trapped: I'm sealed in my car. Bees are all over the outside. I'm allergic!
I can't get out. The swarm is thick on my windshield.
evacuated: We're safe inside a building. The bees are still at the intersection.
No injuries so far. Just scared.
cleared: The bee keeper took them away. Traffic is moving again.

initial: It's extremely urgent! Someone might get stung badly!
Please hurry, the bees are getting agitated!
trapped: I'm trapped and allergic! This is life-threatening!
I can't breathe from panic! Hurry!
evacuated: It's urgent but we are safe for now. Need bee removal.
The swarm is still a hazard.

initial: Tell everyone to stay inside their cars or go into nearby buildings. Close windows.
Evacuate the intersection on foot, but move calmly and cover your face.
trapped: Stay in your car with windows up. Do not honk or move suddenly.
Keep calm, do not provoke the bees. Help is on the way.
evacuated: Wait for animal control or a beekeeper. Do not approach the swarm.
Keep people away from the area.
cleared: The swarm has been removed. You can return to your cars.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police block off the area and wait for animal control. Traffic is delayed but no injuries.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters spray water, agitating the swarm. Several people get stung, causing minor injuries.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medics arrive but find no injuries yet. They stand by.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Beekeeper arrives and safely relocates the swarm. No stings, traffic resumes.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as non-emergency. A driver allergic to bees exits car, gets stung, and goes into anaphylactic shock before help arrives.
